positive: A stylish, minimalist depiction of abstract nature elements: flowing mountain ranges, gently stylized pine trees, and serene curved waves, rendered in a vibrant watercolor wash style. The composition should feature a central mountain silhouette layered over calm, horizontal water curves. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, teal, sage green, and creamy off-white. The artwork must have clean, crisp edges and defined silhouettes, making it highly readable and impactful when scaled onto fabric. Flat lay style, perfect for t-shirt or tote bag printing. High contrast, vector-quality aesthetic, graphic design poster, clean lines.
negative: photorealistic, messy, blurry, grainy, watermark, text, logo, signature, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy edges, low quality, cropped, distressed, gradient, overexposed
